Device.$description: Breakpoint id. Media-query tier; also the Figma grid style Grid/Mobile.

Breakpoint-Min.$description: min-width where the mobile tier activates (0px). Use for CSS media queries / container queries.

Device-Width.$description: Canonical mobile design width (375px). From Brand-book Grid S. In Figma bind a template frame width; apply grid style Grid/Mobile.

Columns.$description: Grid columns (2). Embodied by Figma grid style Grid/Mobile (Brand-book Grid S).

Margin.$description: Outer page margin (16px). Template side padding.

Root-Font-Size.$description: Root rem base (16px) = Typography Primitives Size/16. Constant across breakpoints.

Device.$description: Breakpoint id. Media-query tier; also the Figma grid style Grid/Tablet.

Breakpoint-Min.$description: min-width where the tablet tier activates (768px). Use for CSS media queries / container queries.

Device-Width.$description: Canonical tablet design width (768px). From Brand-book Grid M. In Figma bind a template frame width; apply grid style Grid/Tablet.

Columns.$description: Grid columns (8). Embodied by Figma grid style Grid/Tablet (Brand-book Grid M).

Margin.$description: Outer page margin (24px). Template side padding.

Root-Font-Size.$description: Root rem base (16px) = Typography Primitives Size/16. Constant across breakpoints.

Device.$description: Breakpoint id. Media-query tier; also the Figma grid style Grid/Desktop.

Breakpoint-Min.$description: min-width where the desktop tier activates (1280px). Use for CSS media queries / container queries.

Device-Width.$description: Canonical desktop design width (1440px). From Brand-book 12-columns L (1280) / XL (1440), 80px columns centered. In Figma bind a template frame width; apply grid style Grid/Desktop.

Columns.$description: Grid columns (12). Embodied by Figma grid style Grid/Desktop (Brand-book 12-columns L (1280) / XL (1440), 80px columns centered).

Margin.$description: Outer page margin (152px - centers the 12x80 grid at 1440). Template side padding.

Root-Font-Size.$description: Root rem base (16px) = Typography Primitives Size/16. Constant across breakpoints.
